objective: Run the checked-in full 47-row Lite and Lite React benchmark protocol for exact baseline 293dcdf2 versus candidate 32e09eed and determine whether confirmed regressions remain zero.

predeclared_method.fallback: Only if the full five-pair comparator returns evidence_inconclusive, capture pairs 6 through 9 once in the checked-in continuing order and compare once after pair 9.
predeclared_method.capture: Use benchmarks/lite-perf/scripts/capture.mjs for each lane and rebuild the named artifact in its exact root before every capture.
predeclared_method.comparison: Use scripts/compare.mjs --mode full with the predeclared pair count.
predeclared_method.acceptance: All 47 rows present, environment and artifact checks held, and confirmed_regression row count equals zero.

anti_goals: Do not edit product, benchmark, test, docs, configuration, Git, PR, or prior evidence.
Do not inspect partial comparisons or stop after pairs 6, 7, or 8.
Do not repeat a pair, row, lane, or capture until favorable.
Do not mix source-tree imports, environments, writers, artifacts, or baselines.
Do not claim the lifecycle target from the 47-row benchmark or the 47-row result from P15.
Do not merge, release, publish, or deploy.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
